uplink.description: Status uplink (battery + sabotage + hall LOW/closed + input clamp LOW)
Hall sensor state change to HIGH (window open)
Status uplink with hall HIGH/open, sabotage TRIGGERED, input clamp HIGH
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds GET_STATUS frame (tx-enable 0xF0 = battery|sabotage|hall|clamp). Battery code 200 -> 200*10+1500 = 3500 mV -> 3.5 V. Hall HIGH -> contactState 'open'. expected.data produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (mV string 3500 -> 3.5 V; hall HIGH; sabotage TRIGGERED; clamp HIGH).
Synthetic COMMAND_ID_GET_BATTERY_VOLTAGE (id 5). Code 144 -> 144*10+1500 = 2940 mV -> 2.94 V, matching reference/upstream-codec.js battery_voltage.value '2940' mV.
Synthetic: command id 99 (0x63) is not in the device's COMMAND_ID table; the reference decoder silently ignores it, our codec reports it as an error rather than emitting empty data.
